'''zahal''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:edible plant|edible plant]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-h-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:edible plant|edible plant]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæhilith|zæhilith]] || [[word:zæhilij|zæhilij]] || [[word:zæhilish|zæhilish]] || [[word:zæhili|zæhili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zahuhuluth|zahuhuluth]] || [[word:zahuhuluj|zahuhuluj]] || [[word:zahuhulush|zahuhulush]] || [[word:zahuhulu|zahuhulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zahuluth|zahuluth]] || [[word:zahuluj|zahuluj]] || [[word:zahulush|zahulush]] || [[word:zahulu|zahulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zahufluth|zahufluth]] || [[word:zahufluj|zahufluj]] || [[word:zahuflush|zahuflush]] || [[word:zahufluf|zahufluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæheleth|zæheleth]] || [[word:zæhelej|zæhelej]] || [[word:zæhelesh|zæhelesh]] || [[word:zæhele|zæhele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zahoholoth|zahoholoth]] || [[word:zahoholoj|zahoholoj]] || [[word:zahoholosh|zahoholosh]] || [[word:zahoholo|zahoholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zaholoth|zaholoth]] || [[word:zaholoj|zaholoj]] || [[word:zaholosh|zaholosh]] || [[word:zaholo|zaholo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zahofloth|zahofloth]] || [[word:zahofloj|zahofloj]] || [[word:zahoflosh|zahoflosh]] || [[word:zahoflof|zahoflof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || — || — || — || [[word:zahïflïf|zahïflïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || — || — || — || [[word:zahïfhïflïf|zahïfhïflïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæhælæth|zæhælæth]] || [[word:zæhælæj|zæhælæj]] || [[word:zæhælæsh|zæhælæsh]] || [[word:zæhælæ|zæhælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zahahalath|zahahalath]] || [[word:zahahalaj|zahahalaj]] || [[word:zahahalash|zahahalash]] || [[word:zahahala|zahahala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zahalath|zahalath]] || [[word:zahalaj|zahalaj]] || [[word:zahalash|zahalash]] || [[word:zahala|zahala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zahaflath|zahaflath]] || [[word:zahaflaj|zahaflaj]] || [[word:zahaflash|zahaflash]] || [[word:zahaflaf|zahaflaf]]
|}

''50 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zahalatha|zahalatha]] || [[word:zahalaja|zahalaja]] || [[word:zahalasha|zahalasha]] || [[word:zahalaka|zahalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zahalath|zahalath]] || [[word:zahalaj|zahalaj]] || [[word:zahalash|zahalash]] || [[word:zahala|zahala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zahalathal|zahalathal]] || [[word:zahalajal|zahalajal]] || [[word:zahalashal|zahalashal]] || [[word:zahalakal|zahalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zahalathatha|zahalathatha]] || [[word:zahalajaja|zahalajaja]] || [[word:zahalashasha|zahalashasha]] || [[word:zahalaka|zahalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zahalathan|zahalathan]] || [[word:zahalajan|zahalajan]] || [[word:zahalashan|zahalashan]] || [[word:zahalakan|zahalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zahalathaoro|zahalathaoro]] || [[word:zahalajaoro|zahalajaoro]] || [[word:zahalashaoro|zahalashaoro]] || [[word:zahalakaoro|zahalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|66806d6}}
